# Bug: [short clear title]

## Problem

Describe what is going wrong.

## Expected behaviour

Describe what should happen instead.

## Relevant docs

- `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
- `docs/COPILOT_WORKFLOW.md`

## Scope

This bug fix should include:

- [specific fix]

This bug fix should not include:

- unrelated refactors
- new features
- architecture rewrites

## Files likely involved

- `src/...`

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The bug is fixed.
- [ ] The app still builds/runs.
- [ ] No unrelated features were added.
- [ ] Relevant docs are updated if needed.

## Testing instructions

Explain exactly how this can be tested.

## Notes for Copilot

Keep the fix focused.
